feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP Clean Core for Unreleased Function Module
entry.content:
Dear Expert, 

I've a requirement to expose FM CREATE_RFC_REENTRANCE_TICKET as an oData Service. Conventional method was using SEGW to expose as an oData service to return the value I need. However for S/4 HANA 2023 Private Edition, how could I achieve it via Clean-Core approach?

Reference from https://github.com/SAP-samples/tier2-rfc-proxy

Are we able to wrap unreleased non-RFC FM using transaction ACO_PROXY? 

If can, after wrapping the FM, how could we expose it as consumable oData service that visible in transaction /iwfnd/maint_service?

#s4hana, #abapcleancore, #odata, #cleancoreguideline

Regards,

Ben

entry.title: How to deploy Custom UI5 application onto SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public edition?
entry.content:
Hi community,
I have a scenario for creating a custom application and deploying it as a tile on the S4 HANA Cloud Public edition's FLP.

Using eclipse ADT, I have connected my dev system of HANA Public Cloud, and created a Custom Package under the Super package ZCUSTOM_DEVELPOMENT (so that the development objects can be moved to T and P systems).

My custom package holds the following objects:

  1. Custom database tables
  2. Custom ABAP Classes to handle the logic on the tables
  3. The IAM application / Business Configurations (based on few tables) to maintain data from the user side
  4. Custom root view entities on top of the ABAP classes
  5. The  service bindings and service definitions of the custom root view entities (their respective authorization objects).
  6. Custom Business catalog to store the IAM applications which are published to the HANA Cloud.

Process: (Backend)

  1. Created custom Z* Package to store the custom build objects.
  2. Created database tables to store the data.
  3. For a few tables, the business configuration objects are created to expose those tables on the HANA Cloud to maintain data.
  4. Created custom ABAP classes to handle the logic on the data in the custom tables.
  5. Created custom root entities and implemented the if_rap_query_provides~select method to handle the HTTPS calls when the root entities are exposed as an API. (Ref: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-a4c-create-custom-entity.html)
  6. Created a service definition for the custom root entity.
  7. Created service binding on top of the service definition to expose them as an OData V4 API.

Process: (Frontend)

  1. Create BTP destination do SAMLAssertion authentication type to connect the HANA cloud system. (Ref: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/31876c06f99645f289d802f9c95fb62b.html?locale=en-US)
  2. Created a custom UI application using the template.
  3. Consume the exposed Odata V4 services in the application by providing the endpoints in manifest.json file, configure the BTP destination in UI5.yaml and xs-app.json file to connect the application to backend system.
  4. The application loads successfully and in the preview mode and the data flows in preview mode.
  5. Build the mta.yaml file to generate the .mtar file.
  6. Deploy the .mtar file to deploy the application to BTP.
  7. On successful deployment, the application is available under HTML5 Applications in BTP.

After performing all these step, how can we add this developed custom application as a FIORI tile onto the S4 HANA Public cloud FLP under a custom catalog, Custom role, custom space and page?

Tried Scenario:

  1. Create a custom tile using the application Custom Tiles on HANA Cloud Public edition FLP.
  2. Provided the deployed application URL in the details of the custom tile.
  3. During assigning the catalog, The custom catalog in which the IAM applications are added is not visible in the list of catalogs to assign. Rather it shows all the SAP Standard business catalogs

How to add this custom tile to the custom business catalog created using ADT on eclipse?

Regards,
Shyam Prasad.

entry.title: Create a new Z field in ME21N/ME22N/ME23N under Delivery tab
entry.content:
Hello,

would be possible to create a new Z field in the Delivery tab at item level in this transactions? I found some Badis and user exits but none meets this possibility.

 

Regards.

entry.title: roles for user in SU01 for to send email
entry.content:
hello everyone,

I'm using the method cl_sapuser_bcs=>create( lv_sender ) to send the email.

I need to create a user in SU01 to use in the variable above "lv_sender".

What roles should the user I create in SU01 have?

entry.title: BADI + Multiple Calls
entry.content:
Folks,

I understand the difference between Classical BADI and Kernel BADI in terms of multiple implementations. But I didn't understand what it meant by " Multiple Calls are not possible in Classical BADI whereas multiple calls are possible in Kernel BADI ".

Can anyone please share their expertise on this.

Thanks,
K.Kiran.

entry.title: Update ACDOCP table from ABAP options
entry.content:
Hi,

As part of custom developments, I need to update the plan data in ACDOCP table from a custom application.

I found one api Financial Planning Data - Write (https://api.sap.com/api/API_FINPLANNINGDATA_SRV/overview). Is it the right way to update the ACDOCP table using this api or do we have any standard class or FM available in on-premise system?

Any guidance on this topic is really appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: Issues for generating OData multipart batch/changeset with CL_HTTP_CLIENT
entry.content:
I had some weird issues with CL_HTTP_CLIENT 7.40 SP23 for generating an HTTP request to consume an OData V2.0 service, e.g. a simple creation (POST), and to help other people, I'm posting a solution right now for generating this kind of HTTP request with 2 nested multipart and an application/http message at the lowest level:

  • POST .../$batch with Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=batch_xxxxxx
    • Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=changeset_xxxxxx
      • Content-Type: application/http (the body is the POST request)

The weird issues were for instance:

  • a multipart/form-data content-type without boundary definition,
  • a loss of the contents inside the changeset,
  • a content-type duplicated from the inner multipart,
  • etc.

In fact, all these issues come from a wrong usage of the CL_HTTP_* methods, methods called in the wrong order, etc.

NB: it's just for test purpose, to be used in an old ABAP system, I don't want to log in a recent ABAP system to generate a Service Consumption Class (How to use the OData Client Proxy in SAP S/4 HANA ... - SAP Community).

The final HTTP request should look like this:

POST https://dummy/sap/opu/odata/sap/MD_CUSTOMER_MASTER_SRV_01/$batch?sap-client=100 HTTP/1.0
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=847ED772BCB1300A1800E26E1B3AE6F50
Content-Length:          481
x-csrf-token: x2VarmW8AM0BAsY_flyWlg==
dataserviceversion: 2.0

--847ED772BCB1300A1800E26E1B3AE6F50
Content-Type: multipart/mixed; boundary=847ED772BCB1300A1800E26E1B3AE6F51

--847ED772BCB1300A1800E26E1B3AE6F51
Content-Type: application/http

POST C_BusinessPartnerCustomerCreate?sap-client=100&BusinessPartner=''&BusinessPartnerCategory='1'&BusinessPartnerGrouping='' HTTP/1.0
Content-Type: application/json
Content-Length: 0
dataserviceversion: 2.0


--847ED772BCB1300A1800E26E1B3AE6F51--

--847ED772BCB1300A1800E26E1B3AE6F50--

Sandra

entry.title: Error-assigning a company code to a controlling area
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

When I follow the path mentioned below, I have an error:

Path: SPRO >> enterprise structure >> assignment >> controlling >> assign company code to controlling area >> select a controlling area >> clicking on (assignment of company code) >> new entries >> select a company code >> save (button) >> error

Kindly find the images of the error attached

Kindly tell me how to solve this issue

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Eclipse - Where-Used functionality for ABAP CDS views not working
entry.content:
Hi all,

I want to get the know the all usage of a CDS View. In the subsequent screenshot, I try to get the "where-used-list" of CDS View I_MaterialDocumentRecord. I get only 5 hits in the result whereas my colleague gets more than 200.

I have already tried the following points:

  • Calling "where-used" from project editor, outline, code editor and the menu button. All results in the same behavior.
  • Activated business function "SRIS_CODE_SEARCH" as suggested by the eclipse config guide.
  • Ran the code-search and this also doesn't show related CDS views
  • Downloaded a different Eclipse-Version 2409 with no change
  • Checked authorization object s_adt_res and a * star is assigned to me

To me it looks like that the object types are filtered, as I can see only access controls and package interfaces. But I don't find any setting, where I would be able to change this.

As I'm really stuck, any help is highly appreciated.

entry.title: ABAP Create Customers and vendors
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am looking for a way to create customers and vendors from ABAP code, and assign to Company Code, in a legacy EPR system (not S4), and BP concept is not activated.

I guess inserting records in LFA1/LFB1 and KNA1/KNB1 is not a good approach.

Is there an ABAP function to do that? I cannot find anything in Google.

Thanks, ILIAN

entry.title: BAPI for Material storage location wise stock check
entry.content:
I need a BAPI in which i can check material storage location & plant wise current stock.

Right now i am using "BAPI_MATERIAL_AVAILABILITY" but here its give total stock but i need storage location wise stock.

Regards-

Rajib

entry.title: Custom field Addition to ALV Display for T-code ME5A
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to add a field in the ALV display of Me5a which displays purchase requisitions. For this I need to change the global structure is what I know. Are there any enhancements points i can make use of to achieve the requirement.

entry.title: [MDGF] - Configuration of "Type of Transfer" File Upload/Download app
entry.content:
Hello all!

In MDG, there are the File Upload and File Download app. In the first selection screen, there is the option called "Type of Transfer". Inside the domain, there are default values:

A Attributes
T Language-Dependent Texts
H Hierarchies

But, depends on which Entity Type we selected, for example "cost center" shows only A or T. 

I need to discover where we can do this configuration.

I already looked in IMGMDG, but did not find yet.

Thank you!

entry.title: RAP BO, impossible to DELETE table Row
entry.content:
In a Behavior Definition of a BO, I need to integrate a DELETE query : 

DELETE FROM ztable WHERE id = @existing_row_in_ztable-id

Unfortunately, this doesn't work. At Runtime execution of this snippet, it gives the following error

ABAP Runtime error 'BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT'

Now you way rightfully ask: "Are you really trying to delete a row directly from the table ?"
And to That I would respond: "I wanted to delete the row from the Consumption view but Eclipse wouldn't let me."

When trying to delete the row from the Consumption view, it gives the following error: 

Change operations on entities are not yet supported.

So I'm asking for your guidance: How am I supposed to delete a Row from the Table ?

entry.title: ABAP CDS getting count of multiple tables in one CDS
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is it possible to get the count of entries from multiple tables (with no linkage) into a single CDS view.

Actually we are trying to use this CDS for reconciliation purposes and send this information to non SAP data lake to compare the count of records.

Thank You.

Vinod

entry.title: RV_SALES_DOCUMENT_VIEW_3 - Customer selection not working
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm facing an issue with function module RV_SALES_DOCUMENT_VIEW_3 when trying to obtain open sales orders, similar to transaction VA05.

Adding either material or sales order values in VBCOM provides the necessary filtered output. 
However, the filtering doesn't seem to be working by customer number (KUNNR).

Do you have any insights on how this issue can be overcome? I want to filter out open sales orders at a CUSTOMER LEVEL.
Any suggestions welcome.

Best Regards,
Samith

entry.title: Sales Order Flexible Workflow (WS02000006)
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am working on a sales order flexible workflow (WS02000006) right now. I have finished all the setup needed to get the workflow going, and it is triggering for the creation of a sales order for the specified condition. The workflow is triggerring, and it is sending notification to My Inbox of the defined user having the role to release, reject, or rework the sales order.
But without any manual intervention, SAP_WFRT is automatically releasing the sales order.
How to stop the automatic release of the sales order by SAP_WFRT and assign it to the desired user.

entry.title: We need to call FB03 fiori app with below parameters in fiori elements reports. How can we do it ?
entry.content:
Hello All,


So we have requirement to call FB03 fiori app and see the details of related doucment number clicked . So for same we have written below code but we need to make sure that parameters such as document no. , Co. code and fiscal year is passed , so that when clicked particular document number gets opened up . 

Below are the parameters to be passed:

 

Below is the code , we are trying to write . So the query is how to pass above given Doucment number, Fiscal year and company code. We have all these fields available in our rows but how to pass these values in below code. Can you provide sample code ?

 

@Consumption.semanticObject: 'BillingDocument'

@ui.lineItem: [

{ position : 3, semanticObject: 'BillingDocument' , semanticObjectAction: 'displayBillingDocument',

type: #WITH_INTENT_BASED_NAVIGATION, value: 'BillingDoc', requiresContext: true}

 

SAP Fiori Launchpad 
SAP BTP, ABAP environment 

ABAP Development

entry.title: WBS Field need to be editable when User status is ZWCN.
entry.content:
Hi All.

in CJ20N

i have a project.

for the particular project  when user status ZWCN is not active, then WBS element field need to editable

If user status is ZWCN then WBS field is non editable.

the problem is, When user status is not ZWCN still the WBS element is non editable,

How to resolve this issue, and how to make it editable,

please help me to resolve this,

if there anu any standard exits please mention them.

And if any custom enhancement , please give a path to how to find them.

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to exclude system and technical users roles from filter query
entry.content:
Hello

I am trying to retrieve a list of users but want to exclude system and technical user roles such as ('BGRFCUSER', 'S4H_FIN','S4H_ECM_EE2', 'S4H_HCM_EE2', 'S4H_MM') etc. However, every time a new system/technical user role is added to the exclusion query, a different one shows up in the output. What method could I use to only retrieve actual users without having to declaratively state each user that I do not want to display in the output?

SELECT * FROM swwuserwi INTO TABLE lt_users
WHERE wi_id <> ls_swwwihead-wi_id AND user_id <> ls_swwwihead-wi_aagent AND
user_id NOT IN ('BGRFCUSER', 'S4H_FIN','S4H_ECM_EE2', 'S4H_HCM_EE2', 'S4H_MM', 'S4H_HCM_MGR2' )
